title: Introduction to Redstone
description: Learn the basics of redstone circuits

content.text:
Redstone Basics

Redstone is Minecraft's version of electricity. It allows you to create circuits and mechanisms.

Redstone Components:

  • Redstone Dust - Carries power like wires
  • Redstone Torch - Provides power
  • Lever - Toggle switch
  • Button - Momentary switch
  • Redstone Repeater - Extends signal distance

Simple Circuit:

  • Place a lever on a block
  • Place redstone dust next to it
  • Connect to a redstone lamp
  • Toggle the lever to turn the lamp on/off

Redstone Rules:

  • Power travels up to 15 blocks
  • Repeaters extend the signal
  • Power can activate doors, pistons, and more
  • Circuits can be complex or simple
content.task: Create a simple redstone circuit with a lever, redstone dust, and a redstone lamp.
